judge_thought:
Explanation: The question asks for the year in which she received her most recent highest rated position. From the original table, we look at the "position" column to identify the highest rankings.
The highest rankings (excluding numeric positions in favor of ordinal ranks like "2nd", "3rd", "5th") are:
- 2nd in 2001 (European Junior Championships)
- 2nd in 2002 (World Junior Championships)
- 2nd in 2008 (World Athletics Final)
- 2nd in 2009 (World Student Games)
- 3rd in 2009 (World Championships)
- 3rd in 2009 (World Athletics Final)
- 2nd in 2012 (European Championships)

Among these, the most recent year is 2012, where she ranked 2nd in the European Championships. Therefore, the Prediction Answer of 2012 is correct.
